<?php /* * This file is part of the DebugBar package. * * (c) 2013 Maxime Bouroumeau-Fuseau * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace DebugBar; /** * Basic request ID generator */ class RequestIdGenerator implements RequestIdGeneratorInterface { /** * @return string */ public function generate() { return 'X'.bin2hex(random_bytes(16)); } }
